General.Name: Nusatrip Incorporated Common Stock
General.Description: NusaTrip Incorporated provides online ticketing and reservation services in Indonesia, Singapore, Vietnam, the Philippines, and Thailand. The Company operates in five segments: Ticketing, Online Advertisement, Hotel Reservation, Hotel Technology Platform Software, and Ancillary. It operates a platform where travelers can search, compare, and book flights, hotels, car rentals, and other travel-related services through NusaTrip and VLeisure websites, and NusaTrip mobile application. The company also offers online advertising services; VLeisure Operation System that includes property management system, channel management, points of sales, revenue management system, and customer data platform for small to medium-sized hotels; and travel insurance products. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. NusaTrip Incorporated operates as a subsidiary of Society Pass Incorporated.
